mapper.sql: t.id, t.exception_order_id, t.exception_no, t.order_id, t.exception_type, t.exception_source, t.exception_status, t.responsible_user_id, t.upgrade_flag, t.exception_desc, t.external_system_name, t.external_error_code, t.root_cause, t.solution_desc, t.prevention_desc, t.discover_time, t.close_time, t.close_user_id, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_exception_order t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_exception_order t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_exception_order t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_exception_order ( exception_order_id, exception_no, order_id, exception_type, exception_source, exception_status, responsible_user_id, upgrade_flag, exception_desc, external_system_name, external_error_code, root_cause, solution_desc, prevention_desc, discover_time, close_time, close_user_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{exceptionOrderId}, #{exceptionNo}, #{orderId}, #{exceptionType}, #{exceptionSource}, #{exceptionStatus}, #{responsibleUserId}, #{upgradeFlag}, #{exceptionDesc}, #{externalSystemName}, #{externalErrorCode}, #{rootCause}, #{solutionDesc}, #{preventionDesc}, #{discoverTime}, #{closeTime}, #{closeUserId}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_exception_order ( exception_order_id, exception_no, order_id, exception_type, exception_source, exception_status, responsible_user_id, upgrade_flag, exception_desc, external_system_name, external_error_code, root_cause, solution_desc, prevention_desc, discover_time, close_time, close_user_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.exceptionOrderId}, #{item.exceptionNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.exceptionType}, #{item.exceptionSource}, #{item.exceptionStatus}, #{item.responsibleUserId}, #{item.upgradeFlag}, #{item.exceptionDesc}, #{item.externalSystemName}, #{item.externalErrorCode}, #{item.rootCause}, #{item.solutionDesc}, #{item.preventionDesc}, #{item.discoverTime}, #{item.closeTime}, #{item.closeUserId}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_exception_order t SET
t.exception_status = #{exceptionStatus},
t.responsible_user_id = #{responsibleUserId},
t.upgrade_flag = #{upgradeFlag},
t.root_cause = #{rootCause},
t.solution_desc = #{solutionDesc},
t.close_time = #{closeTime},
t.close_user_id = #{closeUserId},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_exception_order t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
